**Analyzing strike announcement**

I need to determine if the document is announcing a new or upcoming strike. It mentions "Sciopero, adesione personale Atac al 18,5%," published on November 17, 2023. The participation rate of 18.5% indicates it reports on attendance for a strike that occurred today, not an upcoming one. Since it reflects past participation, I will set isStrike to false. My final output will be a JSON response: {"isStrike": false}.
